title: Veritas Legal, ELP act on Inorbit Malls' ₹1,242 crore acquisition of Prozone Realty mall subsidiaries
description: Inorbit Malls (India) Private Limited is acquiring a 100% stake in Kruti Realtors and Developers Private Limited, Alliance Mall Developers Co. Private Limited and Empire Malls Private Limited from Prozone Realty Limited, at a valuation of ₹1,242.50 crore, to be adjusted for other assets and liabilities as per mutual agreement at completionVeritas Legal is advising Inorbit Malls on this acquisition. The Firm advised on due diligence, structuring, negotiation and drafting of the transaction docume
